placebo_group.description: Placebo group: 73 children total, 2 discharged at first examination. Used in answer to assess observed and expected frequencies for evaluating appropriateness of Fisher's exact test vs Chi squared test.

prednisolone_group.description: Prednisolone group: 67 children total, 20 discharged at first examination. Used in answer to assess observed and expected frequencies for evaluating appropriateness of Fisher's exact test vs Chi squared test.
